title: Cantillon Effects
description: New money enters economies through specific channels, changing relative prices unevenly. Distribution effects depend on who receives new liquidity first.

resources.title: Hayek: The Use of Knowledge in Society
resources.notes: Context for decentralized price coordination and information dispersion.

resources.title: Bitcoin Design
resources.notes: Practical user-facing framing of monetary policy impacts.

resources.title: Broken Money
resources.notes: Bitcoin-vs-fiat framing for how new money changes purchasing power unevenly across the economy.
